data.body: We should refine the review skills to say that no write operations are permitted on code - writes on knots (notes, handoff_capsules) are expected.  but not on code.  so no code editing or git write operations.  if the agent feels that write operations on code/git are required, the agent should follow the reject/failure path of the workflow profile (move it into a prior queue of some sort)
data.title: Skills: Review skills should have code write constraints.
